content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt:1-3 claims "AI-powered suggestions," "built-in ad blocker," and "works fully offline," but ContentView.swift shows only a plain local String array to-do list with no AI/ML frameworks, no ad-blocking (e.g. WKContentRuleList), and no offline-sync/network layer implemented at all.

Pierre: Apple's reviewers actively test marketing claims against real app behavior, and unsubstantiated AI/ad-blocking/offline claims are a common 2.1/2.3 rejection reason. The entire codebase provided is a single trivial task list view with no AI, networking, or content-blocking code, so these claims appear entirely aspirational. Either implement the described features or strip these specific claims from the description before submission.
